water.name: Floyd Lamb Park Ponds
aliases: Floyd Lamb Park at Tule Springs Ponds

sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Clark County Community Fishing Ponds: Boulder City Pond, Sunset Park Pond, Floyd Lamb Park Ponds, Lorenzi Park Pond and Mesquite Urban Pond – Hafen Lane Pond. Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours parks are open to public use.

sources.title: Floyd Lamb Park / Tule Springs Ponds — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Located at 9200 Tule Springs Road, Las Vegas, the pond is one of a series of four ponds; only the largest, uppermost pond is regularly stocked. Primary game fish are rainbow trout and channel catfish, stocked seasonally; bluegill, redear sunfish, green sunfish, crappie and largemouth bass are also present.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: The Floyd Lamb Park (Tule Springs) Ponds are open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit is stated for Floyd Lamb Park Ponds; the limit applies to the combined daily/possession total across all game fish species.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County Community Fishing Ponds (incl. Floyd Lamb Park Ponds)
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) at Floyd Lamb Park Ponds.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: NDOW's commission-regulation table lists hours generically as 'hours parks are open to public use'; Floyd Lamb Park (Clark County) sets its own posted park hours.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing at the Floyd Lamb Park Ponds is allowed during the hours the park is open to the public.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours parks are open to public use

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
